SHINE_POWER.title: Shine
SHINE_POWER.description: Affects cards with Shine. Adds value equal to your Shine.
TURN_SHINE_POWER.title: Turn Shine
TURN_SHINE_POWER.description: Shine that lasts for this turn. Removed at end of turn.
TEMP_SHINE_POWER.title: Temporary Shine
TEMP_SHINE_POWER.description: Removed after you play a card with Shine.
REVENGE_POWER.title: Revenge
REVENGE_POWER.description: Affects cards with Shine. Multiplies card values by your Revenge, and playing a Shine card costs HP equal to your Revenge.
TURN_REVENGE_POWER.title: Turn Revenge
TURN_REVENGE_POWER.description: Revenge that lasts for this turn. Removed at end of turn.
TEMP_REVENGE_POWER.title: Temporary Revenge
TEMP_REVENGE_POWER.description: Removed after you play a card with Shine.
REVENGE_REFUND_POWER.title: Revenge Refund
SHINE_REFUND_POWER.title: Shine Refund
GAIN_TEMP_SHINE_NEXT_TURN_POWER.title: Temporary Shine Next Turn
GAIN_TEMP_SHINE_NEXT_TURN_POWER.descript: At the start of your next turn, gain [gold]Temporary Shine[/gold].
GAIN_TEMP_SHINE_NEXT_TURN_POWER.smarterD: At the start of your next turn, gain {Amount} [gold]Temporary Shine[/gold].
GAIN_TURN_SHINE_NEXT_TURN_POWER.title: Turn Shine Next Turn
GAIN_TURN_SHINE_NEXT_TURN_POWER.descript: At the start of your next turn, gain [gold]Turn Shine[/gold].
GAIN_TURN_SHINE_NEXT_TURN_POWER.smarterD: At the start of your next turn, gain {Amount} [gold]Turn Shine[/gold].
GAIN_TEMP_REVENGE_NEXT_TURN_POWER.title: Temporary Revenge Next Turn
GAIN_TEMP_REVENGE_NEXT_TURN_POWER.descri: At the start of your next turn, gain [gold]Temporary Revenge[/gold].
GAIN_TEMP_REVENGE_NEXT_TURN_POWER.smarte: At the start of your next turn, gain {Amount} [gold]Temporary Revenge[/gold].
GAIN_TURN_REVENGE_NEXT_TURN_POWER.title: Turn Revenge Next Turn
GAIN_TURN_REVENGE_NEXT_TURN_POWER.descri: At the start of your next turn, gain [gold]Turn Revenge[/gold].
GAIN_TURN_REVENGE_NEXT_TURN_POWER.smarte: At the start of your next turn, gain {Amount} [gold]Turn Revenge[/gold].
VENGEANCE_BELL_POWER.title: Revenge Bell (Echo)
VENGEANCE_BELL_POWER.description: At the start of your next turn, all enemies lose 10 HP.
ACT_CUTE_NEXT_TURN_POWER.title: Act Cute (Prepared)
ACT_CUTE_NEXT_TURN_POWER.description: At the start of your next turn, become Intangible and unable to play cards, then heal at end of turn.
ACT_CUTE_NEXT_TURN_POWER.smarterDescript: At the start of your next turn, become Intangible and unable to play cards. At end of turn, heal {Amount} HP.
ACT_CUTE_LOCKOUT_POWER.title: Acting Cute
ACT_CUTE_LOCKOUT_POWER.description: You can't play cards. Heal at end of turn.
ACT_CUTE_LOCKOUT_POWER.smarterDescriptio: You can't play cards. At end of turn, heal {Amount} HP.
MIRROR_STAGE_POWER.title: Mirror Stage
MIRROR_STAGE_POWER.description: Reflect all damage blocked this turn.
MOTHERS_LIE_POWER.title: Mother's Lies
MOTHERS_LIE_POWER.description: Whenever you lose HP this turn, all enemies lose HP.
MOTHERS_LIE_POWER.smarterDescription: Whenever you lose HP this turn, all enemies lose {Amount} HP.
NEXT_SHINE_DISCOUNT_POWER.title: Rhythm Adjustment
NEXT_SHINE_DISCOUNT_POWER.description: Your next Shine card costs 1 less.
PASSION_POWER.title: Passion
PASSION_POWER.description: Gain 1 stack at end of turn. At 12 stacks, you become Hoshino Ai's captive.
CHASING_LIGHT_POWER.title: Chasing The Light
CHASING_LIGHT_POWER.description: Whenever you spend enough [gold]Shine[/gold], gain 1 Energy.
FLEEING_LIGHT_POWER.title: Fleeing From Light
FLEEING_LIGHT_POWER.description: Whenever you spend enough [gold]Revenge[/gold], draw 1 card.
LAST_MINUTE_STUDY_POWER.title: Final Review
LAST_MINUTE_STUDY_POWER.description: Whenever you play a Skill, gain 1 [gold]Temporary Shine[/gold].
PROFILE_POWER.title: Profile
PROFILE_POWER.description: Whenever you play a [gold]Plan[/gold] card, draw 1 card.
STAY_INDOORS_POWER.title: Stay Behind Closed Doors
STAY_INDOORS_POWER.description: At end of turn, if you lost HP this turn, gain 2 [gold]Temporary Revenge[/gold] and 5 [gold]Block[/gold] next turn.
NOT_AS_FRAGILE_AS_IMAGINED_POWER.title: Not As Fragile As Imagined
NOT_AS_FRAGILE_AS_IMAGINED_POWER.descrip: You are no longer affected by [gold]Frail[/gold].
RUMOR_NETWORK_POWER.title: Rumor Network
RUMOR_NETWORK_POWER.description: The first time each turn you apply [gold]Weak[/gold] or [gold]Vulnerable[/gold], draw a card.
RUMOR_NETWORK_POWER.smarterDescription: The first time each turn you apply [gold]Weak[/gold] or [gold]Vulnerable[/gold], draw {Amount} cards.
STAGE_ARMOR_POWER.title: Stage Shell
DIE_ALONE_POWER.title: Die Alone
DIE_ALONE_POWER.description: The first time each turn you lose HP, gain 3 [gold]Block[/gold].
RUBY_LEGACY_POWER.title: Ruby's Legacy
RUBY_LEGACY_POWER.description: Whenever you gain [gold]Shine[/gold], gain 3 [gold]Block[/gold]. Whenever you gain [gold]Revenge[/gold], lose 1 HP and gain 8 [gold]Block[/gold].
DUAL_MIRROR_POWER.title: Double-sided Mirror
SHELL_FORGED_BY_LIES_POWER.title: Shell Forged by Lies
SHELL_FORGED_BY_LIES_POWER.description: At end of turn, deal [gold]Revenge[/gold] x4 damage to all enemies. If you lost HP this turn, deal 8 more damage.
LIGHT_FROM_PASSION_POWER.title: The Light Of Passion
LIGHT_FROM_PASSION_POWER.description: At end of turn, gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to [gold]Shine[/gold] x6.
RETREAT_BACKSTAGE_POWER.title: Escape Behind The Scenes
RETREAT_BACKSTAGE_POWER.description: The first time each turn you gain [gold]Revenge[/gold], gain 2 Energy and 10 [gold]Block[/gold].
TAKE_THE_STAGE_POWER.title: Get On Stage
TAKE_THE_STAGE_POWER.description: The first time each turn you gain [gold]Shine[/gold], draw 2 cards and gain 6 [gold]Block[/gold].
IDOL_RADIANCE_POWER.title: Idol Radiance
IDOL_RADIANCE_POWER.description: The first time each turn you play a [gold]Shine[/gold] card, gain 2 [gold]Temporary Shine[/gold].
REVEAL_TRUTH_POWER.title: Reveal The Truth
REVEAL_TRUTH_POWER.description: At the start of turn, if your HP is below half, gain 1 [gold]Revenge[/gold].
TRAP_POWER.title: Trap
TRAP_POWER.description: Attack damage taken is increased by 100%. Lose 1 stack at end of turn.
ESCAPE_POWER.title: Escape
ESCAPE_POWER.description: Attack damage taken is reduced by 50%. Lose 1 stack at end of turn.
RUMOR_POWER.title: Rumor
RUMOR_POWER.description: Each stack increases attack damage taken by 10%. Lose 1 stack at end of turn.
PLAN_POWER.title: Plan
PLAN_POWER.description: Used to play specific cards or change card effects.
BLACK_STAR_POWER.title: Black Star
BLACK_STAR_POWER.description: Whenever you gain Plan, gain 1 additional Plan.
SINKING_POWER.title: Sinking
SINKING_POWER.description: Gain Plan at the start of each turn.
SINKING_POWER.smarterDescription: Gain {Amount} Plan at the start of each turn.
UNREACHABLE_POWER.title: Out Of Reach
UNREACHABLE_POWER.description: For every 7 cards you draw, draw 1 additional card.
ENCORE_POWER.title: Encore
ENCORE_POWER.description: Whenever you gain a Blood-Soaked Petal, gain 2 [gold]Block[/gold].
NIGHTMARE_POWER.title: Nightmare
NIGHTMARE_POWER.description: Whenever a card is exhausted, gain 2 [gold]Temporary Revenge[/gold].
BEAUTIFUL_DREAM_POWER.title: Beautiful Dream
BEAUTIFUL_DREAM_POWER.description: Whenever a card is created in combat, gain Temporary Shine.
BEAUTIFUL_DREAM_POWER.smarterDescription: Whenever a card is created in combat, gain {Amount} Temporary Shine.
TWO_CHILDS_POWER.title: Two Children?
TWO_CHILDS_POWER.description: Each turn, gain 2 Temporary Shine and 2 Temporary Revenge.
HANDSCROLL_PAINTING_POWER.title: Handscroll Painting
HANDSCROLL_PAINTING_POWER.description: After winning the battle, 1 card can be permanently removed from the deck.
FIRE_EXECUTION_POWER.title: Fire Execution
FIRE_EXECUTION_POWER.description: Whenever you deal unblocked damage to an enemy, apply 2 [gold]Rumor[/gold].
METAMORPHOSIS_POWER.title: Metamorphosis
METAMORPHOSIS_POWER.description: You are no longer affected by Weak, Frail, or Vulnerable.
THEREBY_SHINING_POWER.title: Thus Shine
THEREBY_SHINING_POWER.description: Whenever you play a Void card, gain 1 Energy.
EXPECT_POWER.title: Expect
EXPECT_POWER.description: This turn, exhausted cards you play go to your discard pile instead.
BACK_VIEW_POWER.title: Back View
BACK_VIEW_POWER.description: The next card you play returns to your hand.
FARAWAY_POWER.title: Faraway
FARAWAY_POWER.description: At the start of your next turn, deal damage to all enemies.
FARAWAY_POWER.smarterDescription: At the beginning of the next turn, deal {Amount} damage to all enemies.
DESOLATE_BATTLEFIELD_POWER.title: Desolate Battlefield
DESOLATE_BATTLEFIELD_POWER.description: Strength lost this turn is restored at end of turn.
UNDER_THE_SEA_POWER.title: Under the Sea
UNDER_THE_SEA_POWER.description: Die at the beginning of the next turn.
ENCORE_POWER.smarterDescription: Whenever you gain a Blood-Soaked Petal, gain {Amount} [gold]Block[/gold].
TROUBLE_NEXT_TURN_POWER.title: Trouble
TROUBLE_NEXT_TURN_POWER.description: At the start of your next turn, gain Blood-Soaked Petals.
HOSHINO_AI_MECHANICS_POWER.title: Idol Challenge
HOSHINO_AI_MECHANICS_POWER.description: Phase boss: complete current phase goals to advance. When all goals reach 0, phase changes.
HOSHINO_AI_PHASE1_DRAW_GOAL_POWER.title: Phase 1 Draw Goal
HOSHINO_AI_PHASE1_DRAW_GOAL_POWER.descri: Total cards players still need to draw in Phase 1.
HOSHINO_AI_PHASE1_DRAW_GOAL_POWER.smarte: Players still need to draw {Amount} cards in Phase 1.
HOSHINO_AI_PHASE1_PLAY_GOAL_POWER.title: Phase 1 Play Goal
HOSHINO_AI_PHASE1_PLAY_GOAL_POWER.descri: Total cards players still need to play in Phase 1.
HOSHINO_AI_PHASE1_PLAY_GOAL_POWER.smarte: Players still need to play {Amount} cards in Phase 1.
HOSHINO_AI_PHASE1_BLOCK_GOAL_POWER.title: Phase 1 Block Goal
HOSHINO_AI_PHASE1_BLOCK_GOAL_POWER.descr: Total Block players still need to gain in Phase 1.
HOSHINO_AI_PHASE1_BLOCK_GOAL_POWER.smart: Players still need to gain {Amount} Block in Phase 1.
HOSHINO_AI_PHASE2_LIGHT_STICK_GOAL_POWER: Total Light Sticks players still need to play in Phase 2.
Players still need to play {Amount} [gold]Light Sticks[/gold] in Phase 2.
HOSHINO_AI_PHASE3_REBIRTH_GOAL_POWER.des: Players who still need to play Rebirth in Phase 3.
HOSHINO_AI_PHASE3_REBIRTH_GOAL_POWER.sma: {Amount} players still need to play Rebirth in Phase 3.
HOSHINO_AI_SCRUTINY_POWER.title: Draw Restriction
HOSHINO_AI_SCRUTINY_POWER.description: You cannot draw extra cards this turn.
HOSHINO_AI_FIRST_CARD_EXHAUST_POWER.desc: The first card played each turn adds an [gold]Ethereal[/gold] copy of itself to your hand.
HOSHINO_AI_TWO_CARD_DISCARD_POWER.title: Emotional Overload
HOSHINO_AI_TWO_CARD_DISCARD_POWER.descri: Whenever you play a card, discard another random card from your hand.
KAMIKI_HIKARU_PHASE1_STUN_THRESHOLD_POWE: Dealing enough total damage interrupts Kamiki Hikaru and stuns him.
Players need {Amount} more total damage to interrupt and stun Kamiki Hikaru.
KAMIKI_HIKARU_PHASE2_BUFF_PURGE_POWER.de: When phase 2 begins, remove all buffs from players.
